zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol於1268年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯時，她的父親John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne29歲，母親Béatrice of England26歲。她於1292年6月22日與Gui de Chatillon IV在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1339年5月5日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯享年71歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol于1268年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯时，她的父亲John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne29岁，母亲Béatrice of England26岁。她于1292年6月22日与Gui de Chatillon IV在法国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1339年5月5日在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯享年71岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Brittany
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly North American: modern coinage, taken from the traditionally Celtic-speaking region of north-west France, known in medieval Latin as Britannia, because it was settled by refugees from Cornwall and Devon following the establishment of the Anglo-Saxon kingdom of Wessex. Its adoption as a given name has also been influenced by Britt , of which it is sometimes regarded as the full form. In recent years it has rapidly established itself as a popular name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol was born in 1268, in Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, her father, John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne, was 29 and her mother, Béatrice of England, was 26. She married Gui de Chatillon IV on 22 June 1292, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died on 5 May 1339, in Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 71, and was buried in Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol est née en 1268, à Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Béatrice of England, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Gui de Chatillon IV le 22 juin 1292, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 mai 1339, à Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol 1268 in Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne 29 und ihre Mutter Béatrice of England 26. Sie hat am 22. Juni 1292 in Frankreich Gui de Chatillon IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Mai 1339 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol è nata il nel 1268 nel Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Béatrice of England, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Gui de Chatillon IV il 22 giugno 1292, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì il 5 maggio 1339, nel Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Polが1268年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインレンスで生まれた時，父John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagneは29歳，母Béatrice of Englandは26歳であった。1292年6月22日にフランスでGui de Chatillon IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1339年5月5日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスアラスで71歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol(이)가 1268년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 렌스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Béatrice of England(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1292년 6월 22일 프랑스에서 Gui de Chatillon IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1339년 5월 5일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 아라스에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol nasceu em 1268, em Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice of England, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Gui de Chatillon IV em 22 de junho de 1292, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de maio de 1339, em Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol родилась в 1268 г. в местности реннесь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrice of England, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gui de Chatillon IV 22 июня 1292 г. в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 5 мая 1339 г. в местности аррас, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol nació en 1268, en Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Béatrice of England, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Gui de Chatillon IV el 22 de junio de 1292, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió el 5 de mayo de 1339, en Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
